title: Assertion fault on a LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT a, b FROM t1 WHERE a > 1;
CREATE TABLE t3(x INT PRIMARY KEY, y FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM t3 LEFT JOIN v2 ON t3.x = v2.a WHERE v2.b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Assertion fault in LEFT JOIN flattening optimization
